package rulefixtures

import (
	"encoding/json"
)

// scenario for json_unmarshal_same_payload_multiple_times: The same local JSON payload binding is unmarshaled into multiple targets in one function.
// fixture polarity: negative; family: mod; severity: contextual.
type Rule432NegativeRecord struct {
	Name string
	Count int
}

func scenario432Negative(payload []byte) (Rule432NegativeRecord, error) {
	var output Rule432NegativeRecord
	err := json.Unmarshal(payload, &output)
	return output, err
}
